case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. FINANCIAL CASUALTY & SURETY, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FINANCIAL CASUALTY & SURETY, INC. $50,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,450.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
